nasb.text: Moreover, Uzziah built towers in Jerusalem at the Corner Gate and at the Valley Gate and at the corner buttress and fortified them.

esv.text: Moreover, Uzziah built towers in Jerusalem at the Corner Gate and at the Valley Gate and at the Angle, and fortified them.

cnv.text: 烏西雅在耶路撒冷的角門、谷門和城牆轉角的地方，建築了城樓，這些城樓非常堅固。

ccb.text: 乌西雅在耶路撒冷的角门、谷门和城墙拐角的地方建造城楼，并加固城楼，
